person_name: Aulus Vitellius (consul under Caligula and Claudius, father of Emperor Vitellius)
person_name_full: Aulus Vitellius (consul under Caligula and Claudius, father of Emperor Vitellius)
notes: Consul under Caligula and Claudius, father of Emperor Vitellius, known for viciousness and court favor.

docs.title: Annals, Book 14
docs.author: Tacitus
docs.excerpt: The consuls, however, did not dare to ratify the Senate's vote, and simply communicated their unanimous resolution to the emperor. Hesitating for a while between shame and rage, he at last wrote to them in reply "that Antistius, without
